title: Spicy Gooey Turkish Scrambled Eggs Menemen
description: Menemen is a classic Turkish dish made with eggs, onions, tomatoes, and spices. This spicy twist adds cocoa powder and is cooked in an air fryer for a healthier and keto-friendly option.

ingredients.name: eggs
ingredients.notes: Large eggs work best for this recipe.

ingredients.name: tomato
ingredients.notes: Diced and seeded for a milder flavor.

ingredients.name: cocoa powder
ingredients.notes: Adds depth and richness to the dish.

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: Use kosher salt for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: black pepper
ingredients.notes: Freshly ground for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: Used for cooking and adding crispy texture.

instructions: Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together with a fork until well combined.
Heat the olive oil in the air fryer basket liner at 375°F (190°C).
Add the sliced onion to the air fryer and cook for 5 minutes, or until translucent.
Add the diced tomato, minced garlic, cocoa powder, and red pepper flakes to the air fryer and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Pour the whisked eggs over the top of the vegetables and cook for 8-10 minutes, or until the eggs are set and the top is slightly golden brown.
Season the menemen with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the menemen to a plate and garnish with chopped fresh parsley and crumbled feta cheese (if using).
